modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: File not loading to Salesforce via Jitterbit as expected.

full_description_text: I attempted to load a file to Salesforce using Jitterbit, but the folder was not picked up for loading. This issue occurred during the process of file transfer, and it seems that the expected action did not take place. I am unsure why the folder was not recognized, and this has caused a delay in my work.
short_description: File not loading to Salesforce via Jitterbit as expected.
description: I attempted to load a file to Salesforce using Jitterbit, but the folder was not picked up for loading. This issue occurred during the process of file transfer, and it seems that the expected action did not take place. I am unsure why the folder was not recognized, and this has caused a delay in my work.
